title: picea excelsa var. europaea
intro: Picea excelsa var. europaea, also known as European spruce, is a variant of the Picea excelsa tree species native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Picea excelsa var. europaea include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its needles, which are used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
